failedAssertions.reason: top_logprobs dict entries NOT sorted in descending order by logprob in legacy /v1/completions format. 9/9 positions unsorted in non-streaming, 10/10 in streaming. Root cause: buildLegacyLogprobs() in SSEEncoder.swift uses Swift Dictionary ([String: Any]) which does not preserve insertion order. The fix (commit c0e33d8) correctly sorted the TopTokenLogprob arrays used by chat completions, but the legacy format conversion to dict loses ordering. Chat completions /v1/chat/completions works correctly (9/9 sorted, 9/9 chosen first).
